case_title: DANA FERNIE VS. DOE 1 ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERNIE, DANA AS TO DEFENDANT DOE 1 DOES 2 DOES 3 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-10-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-17-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-01-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF FERNIE, DANA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-10-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-01-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17197055)
